title: Cheesy Polish Pierogi Bake
description: A delicious and comforting casserole made with pierogi, cheese, and a crispy bake topping.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion until softened.
Add 1/2 cup milk to skillet and stir to combine.
Add 1/2 cup shredded cheddar to skillet and stir until melted and smooth.
Add cooked pierogi to skillet and stir to combine with cheese sauce.
In a separate bowl, mix together remaining 1/2 cup shredded cheddar and crushed crackers.
Pour pierogi mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with cracker mixture and dot with butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
